hero.title: Hello, I'm Siddhi Mali
hero.description: I am a passionate student developer who loves building practical applications. Currently working on projects like FreshCheck to solve real-world problems. I enjoy learning new technologies and creating modern web and mobile apps.

highlights.label: Built an app focused on food expiry tracking and reducing waste
Strong foundation in programming and object-oriented concepts
Actively learning and building modern web experiences

paragraphs: I am a Computer Science student with a strong interest in software development and problem solving. I enjoy turning ideas into real working applications.
I have built projects like FreshCheck, which helps users track food expiry dates and reduce waste. I like working on projects that have real-life impact.
I am continuously learning technologies like Java, web development, and app development using tools like MIT App Inventor.
My goal is to become a skilled developer and contribute to innovative tech solutions in the future.

projects.title: FreshCheck
projects.description: A mobile app that helps users track expiration dates of food products and reduce food waste.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my skills, projects, and contact details.

projects.title: Java Payment System
projects.description: A Java-based application demonstrating OOP concepts like abstraction, interfaces, and polymorphism.

experience.description: Working on academic and personal projects to improve development skills and gain hands-on experience.

resume.title: Siddhi Mali Resume
resume.description: Download my resume to learn more about my education, skills, and projects.

contact.intro: Feel free to reach out to me for collaboration, projects, or any opportunities. I would love to connect and learn together!
